payload.description: Metro-North Railroad Committee of the MTA Board

evidence_refs.source_quote: 2023 Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan
Metropolitan Transportation Authority
Metropolitan Transportation Authority
MTA Police will highlight the significant police activities incurred during the month reported.
LIRR/MNR PTC Project Update
MTA Real Estate will provide an annual report on leasing and construction opportunities and financial and marketing information related to retail development in Grand Central Terminal.

payload.claim_text: The Committee Chair will request a motion to approve the minutes of the prior month's meeting.
payload.subject: Approval of Minutes

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Committee Chair will request a motion to approve the minutes of the prior month's meeting.

payload.claim_text: The Work Plan will list, by month, the topics scheduled for review. The Committee will be advised if any changes have been made to the plan.
payload.subject: Work Plan

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Work Plan will list, by month, the topics scheduled for review.

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided highlighting major accomplishments and progress on key initiatives and performance indicators.
payload.subject: President's Report

evidence_refs.source_quote: A monthly report will be provided highlighting major accomplishments and progress on key initiatives and performance indicators.

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided highlighting key safety performance statistics and indicators.
payload.subject: Safety

evidence_refs.source_quote: A monthly report will be provided highlighting key safety performance statistics and indicators.

payload.claim_text: MTA Police will highlight the significant police activities incurred during the month reported.
payload.subject: Police Activity Report

evidence_refs.source_quote: MTA Police will highlight the significant police activities incurred during the month reported.

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided highlighting key operating and performance statistics and indicators.
payload.subject: Operations

evidence_refs.source_quote: A monthly report will be provided highlighting key operating and performance statistics and indicators.

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided that compares the Railroad's actual financial performance against its budget and/or forecast both on an accrual and cash basis.
payload.subject: Finance

evidence_refs.source_quote: A monthly report will be provided that compares the Railroad's actual financial performance against its budget and/or forecast both on an accrual and cash basis.

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided that includes a comparison of actual monthly ticket sales, ridership and revenues with the budget and prior year results.
payload.subject: Ridership

evidence_refs.source_quote: A monthly report will be provided that includes a comparison of actual monthly ticket sales, ridership and revenues with the budget and prior year results.

payload.description: Track maintenance work to bring the infrastructure to a state of good repair. Reported quarterly to the Metro-North Railroad Committee.

evidence_refs.source_quote: A quarterly report will be provided that highlights the progress made on track maintenance work to bring the infrastructure to a state of good repair.

payload.description: Positive Train Control implementation and close-out for LIRR and Metro-North following full functionality in December 2020.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Committee will be briefed on the status of project implementation and close-out following full Positive Train Control functionality for both railroads going into effect in December 2020.

payload.description: Metro-North's progress in setting the standard for safety, reliability and innovation in the delivery of excellent customer service. Reported biannually.

evidence_refs.source_quote: A biannual report to the Committee on Metro-North's progress in setting the standard for safety, reliability and innovation in the delivery of excellent customer service.

payload.description: Leasing and construction opportunities and financial and marketing information related to retail development in Grand Central Terminal. Reported annually by MTA Real Estate.

evidence_refs.source_quote: MTA Real Estate will provide an annual report on leasing and construction opportunities and financial and marketing information related to retail development in Grand Central Terminal.

payload.description: The Agency will present its revised 2023 Financial Plan reflecting the 2023 Adopted Budget and an updated Financial Plan for 2023 reflecting the out-year impact of any changes incorporated into the 2023 Adopted Budget.

evidence_refs.source_quote: FEBRUARY 2023
The Agency will present its revised 2023 Financial Plan.

payload.description: A review of the prior year's performance of railroad service will be provided to the Committee.

evidence_refs.source_quote: A review of the prior year's performance of railroad service will be provided to the Committee.

payload.description: A quarterly report providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts, such as composition of the agency's workforce, new hires, and discrimination complaints.

evidence_refs.source_quote: A quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts.

payload.description: A report on Metro-North's ridership trends during 2022 based on monthly ticket sales data and the results of train ridership counts conducted by Metro-North.
